headline.secondary: $7215.59/day is currently being lost due to unresolved store issues

status.message: Multiple operational failures are actively reducing store profitability

execution_required.title: EXECUTION REQUIRED
execution_required.message: Failure to act results in compounding daily revenue loss

inaction_risk.message: If no action is taken, you will lose approximately $50509.13 in the next 7 days

actions.title: STOP DAILY CASH LOSS ($3498.12/DAY)
actions.context: 3 SKUs have inventory >0 and zero sales in the last 90 days
targets: Test Hat (SKU: HAT-OS) — inventory: 8 units — sales: 0 in last 90d
Test Shoes (SKU: SHOE-42) — inventory: 1 units — sales: 0 in last 90d
Test Shirt (SKU: SHIRT-S) — inventory: 3 units — sales: 0 in last 90d

execution.primary: Create automatic discount (15%) and bundle offer for listed SKUs

steps: Shopify → Products → Discounts → Create 15% discount for listed SKUs
Shopify → Bundles / Apps → Create bundle offer for dead inventory listed SKUs
Shopify → Products → Inventory → Verify on-hand quantity + adjust if needed
Ads Manager → Pause campaigns promoting listed SKUs until sell-through improves

expected_outcome.message: Recover up to $48973.65 by fixing this issue

risk_if_ignored.message: You will lose approximately $24486.84 in the next 7 days if no action is taken

actions.title: RECOVER LOST CUSTOMERS ($1551.91/DAY)
actions.context: 5 high-value customers are going quiet — last order 67 days ago on average
targets: Jamie Patel — 68 days since last order — LTV $2228.27
Taylor Hall — 67 days since last order — LTV $2215.24
Riley Walker — 68 days since last order — LTV $2184.76
Riley Miller — 66 days since last order — LTV $2132.09
Avery Brown — 66 days since last order — LTV $2103.00

execution.primary: Send a personal email from the store owner account to each VIP customer with an exclusive offer

steps: Shopify → Analytics → Reports → Identify the biggest daily loss driver
Shopify → Products / Orders → Execute the specific fix on the flagged items
Ads Manager → Pause spend on any campaign tied to the loss driver

expected_outcome.message: Recover up to $10863.36 by fixing this issue

risk_if_ignored.message: You will lose approximately $10863.37 in the next 7 days if no action is taken

actions.title: STOP CASH LEAK ($1116.91/DAY)
actions.context: 88 checkouts abandoned this week — $7818.39 left at the door
targets: 88 checkouts abandoned this week — $7818.39 left at the door

execution.primary: Send a 2-email abandoned cart sequence: immediate recovery email at 1 hour, discount offer at 24 hours

steps: Shopify → Settings → Checkout → Review shipping, payments, and checkout branding
Shopify → Analytics → Checkout behavior → Identify the biggest drop-off step
Ads Manager → Retargeting → Ensure abandoned checkout retargeting is running
Email/CRM → Flows → Abandoned checkout → Enable and verify send timing (1h / 12h / 24h)

expected_outcome.message: Recover up to $7818.39 by fixing this issue

risk_if_ignored.message: You will lose approximately $7818.37 in the next 7 days if no action is taken

actions.consequence: Checkout friction is blocking revenue capture
